unreleased_commits.author: JaredHatfield
unreleased_commits.message:
Refactor workflows and configuration files for improved clarity and functionality

- Update .clip4llm to exclude only LICENSE
- Add cooldown configuration to dependabot.yml
- Enhance add-to-project.yml with a timeout setting
- Modify build-go.yml to include permissions and timeout
- Clean up codeql-go.yml by removing unnecessary comments and updating action versions
- Adjust release-go-github.yml for consistency
- Add timeout to zizmor.yml and refine run command
- Revise LICENSE year to 2026
- Update .gitignore and .clip4llm in docs for consistency
- Enhance _config.yml with callouts and improved description
- Refine justfile comments for clarity
- Introduce new .github/zizmor.yml for dependabot cooldown rules
- Create .gitrepoforge for repository configuration
